nasb.text: Jehoshaphat was thirty-five years old when he became king, and he reigned twenty-five years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Azubah the daughter of Shilhi.

esv.text: Jehoshaphat was thirty-five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned twenty-five years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Azubah the daughter of Shilhi.

cnv.text: 約沙法登基的時候是三十五歲；他在耶路撒冷作王二十五年。他母親名叫阿蘇巴，是示利希的女兒。

ccb.text: 约沙法三十五岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政二十五年。他母亲叫阿苏巴，是示利希的女儿。
